case.title: JOLLY v. MORGAN COUNTY JUNIOR COLLEGE DISTRICT

opinion.h1: JOLLY v. MORGAN COUNTY JUNIOR COLLEGE DISTRICT, 396 U.S. 24 (1969)
opinion.h4: JOLLY v. MORGAN COUNTY JUNIOR COLLEGE DISTRICT ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF COLORADO No. 453. Decided November 10, 1969
opinion.p: Duke W. Dunbar, Attorney General of Colorado, and John E. Bush, Assistant Attorney General, for appellees.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed.
396 U.S. 24 KRAFFT v. NEW YORK APPEAL FROM THE COURT OF APPEALS OF NEW YORK No. 474. Decided November 10, 1969
The appeal is dismissed for want of jurisdiction. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for a writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
